creator: contact@evilham.com
text:
Patch on: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D23372

Summary

Came accross this while dealing with something that depended on libvips>=8.9.0

Test Plan

Built on poudriere without network, tested minimally the software that required libvips>=8.9.0 (https://gancio.org/)

Hopefully this saves the maintainer some time, but since I'm not familiar with vips, further tests from them would be required.
